heading: Pentagon/Shanksville Fund
label: 300mm–64 Pentagon/Shanksville Fund
notes: Amendments2026—Subsec. (d). substituted “Any unobligated amounts” for “Any amounts”.Pub. L. 119–75
amendments: Amendments2026—Subsec. (d). substituted “Any unobligated amounts” for “Any amounts”.Pub. L. 119–75

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: There is established a fund to be known as the World Trade Center Health Program Fund for Certain WTC Responders at the Pentagon and Shanksville, Pennsylvania (referred to in this section as the “Pentagon/Shanksville Fund”), consisting of amounts deposited into the Pentagon/Shanksville Fund under subsection (b).

children.heading: Amount
children.label: b Amount
children.text: Out of any money in the Treasury not otherwise appropriated, there is appropriated for fiscal year 2024 $232,000,000 for deposit into the Pentagon/Shanksville Fund, which amounts shall remain available in such Fund through fiscal year 2033.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Amounts deposited into the Pentagon/Shanksville Fund under subsection (b) shall be available, without further appropriation and without regard to any spending limitation under , to the WTC Program Administrator for the purpose of carrying out with regard to WTC responders enrolled in the WTC Program based on eligibility criteria described in subclause (III) or (IV) of .section 300mm–61(c) of this titlesection 300mm–22 of this titlesection 300mm–21(a)(2)(C)(i) of this title

children.heading: Limitation on other funding
children.label: 2 Limitation on other funding
children.text: Notwithstanding sections 300mm–41(a), 300mm–61(b)(1), 300mm–62(c), and 300mm–63(c) of this title, and any other provision in this subchapter, for the period of fiscal years 2024 through 2033, no amounts made available under this subchapter other than those amounts appropriated under subsection (b) may be available for the purpose described in paragraph (1).

children.heading: Remaining amounts
children.label: d Remaining amounts
children.text: Any unobligated amounts that remain in the Pentagon/Shanksville Fund on , shall be deposited into the Treasury as miscellaneous receipts.September 30, 2033
